notes: T3 docs-only-fast-path was used at lane-start (per its documented contract: no worktree/manifest/lease/sync/proof scaffold). This manifest was added retroactively before merge because merge-gate.yml and tier-label-check.yml both require an authoritative lane-manifest tier and do not yet have a code path recognizing docs-only-fast-path PRs as tier-authoritative on their own (a real gap, distinct from DEBT-030/031 -- not fixed here, flagged for follow-up).
